MoreAffordableItems.Description: Lower Redux Casino prices from the default ten-times Qi Coin cost to the original one-times cost. Example: 1000 Qi Coins becomes 100 Qi Coins.

SpouseRoommateFurnitureAvailability.Description: Choose when Spouse and Heart Events items appear in the Casino shop.

OtherCategoriesAvailability.Description: Choose whether all non-spouse categories use their normal unlock rules by default or are always available when their category toggle is enabled.

IncludeMuseumRewardReplacements.Description: Turn Museum Rewards on or off in the Casino shop.

IncludeSecretSpecialItems.Description: Turn Secret and Special Items on or off in the Casino shop.

IncludeSpouseHeartEventFurniture.Description: Turn Spouse and Heart Events on or off in the Casino shop.

IncludeDesertFestival.Description: Turn Desert Festival furniture, decor, wallpaper, weapons, trinkets, and clothing on or off in the Casino shop.

IncludeCactusSalesmanCactuses.Description: Turn Random Cactus Purchase on or off in the Casino shop.
